stemHtml: Mountain waves create rotors in the air, the height of which when compared to the mountain top means that the centre of the first rotor is usually…

options.a: at the same height or just below the top of the mountain on the leeward side.
options.b: much lower down slope on the windward side of the mountain.
options.c: much higher than the top of the mountain ridge on the leeward side.
options.d: just above the inversion layer in the valley.
